channel.title: Uable on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Uable on Tech Tracker

item.title: Uable - The app for Teens to get mentor, discuss & earn rewards.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-IQ_Ss6A9EEI/YXb-l4-pYfI/AAAAAAAAHGw/hXgQnmWIlrs2HHSOxi9eUzZfG5T5fCgeACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1635188369747710-0.png" alt=""> The world is filled with talented people so you’ll find competition everywhere, the life is like a roller coaster you’ll reach ups and downs at certain point of life which makes life more valuable, however some people especially teens due to thier age factor as they didn’t seen the life long enough to understand and face the hardships of life, many teenagers struggle to cope up with world or unable to succeed thier startup due to lack of knowledge and mentorship.
